seo.title: PrimaSTEM | Privacy Policy
seo.description: PrimaSTEM privacy policy. GDPR-compliant. Data collection, processing, your rights.

sections.sidebarText: Information about the entity responsible for processing your personal data.
sections.body:
#### PRIMASTEM SAS

11 rue de Magdebourg, 75016 Paris, France  
SIRET: 944 985 720 00019  
Email: info@primastem.com

#### Data we collect

We collect the following data through our contact form:

- First and last name
- Email address
- Organization name (optional)
- Country
- Message content
- Type of request

#### Purpose of processing

The data we collect is used to:

- Respond to your information requests
- Process your orders
- Contact you in the context of a business partnership
- Improve our services

sections.sidebarText: Information about the legal basis for processing and your GDPR rights.
sections.body:
#### Legal basis

The processing of your data is based on:

- Your consent (article 6.1.a GDPR)
- The performance of a contract (article 6.1.b GDPR)
- Our legitimate interest (article 6.1.f GDPR)

#### Recipients of the data

Your data is processed only by the PrimaSTEM team. It is not transferred to third parties, except where legally required.

#### Retention period

Data is retained for 3 years from the last contact.

#### Your rights

Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:

- Right of access
- Right to rectification
- Right to erasure
- Right to restriction of processing
- Right to data portability
- Right to object

To exercise these rights, contact us: info@primastem.com

sections.sidebarText: Information about cookie usage and updates to this policy.
sections.body:
#### Cookies

This site uses Google Analytics to analyze traffic. You can decline cookies through the banner displayed on your first visit or via your browser settings.

#### Hosting

This site is hosted by Cloudflare, Inc., 101 Townsend Street, San Francisco, California 94107, USA.

#### Updates

We reserve the right to modify this policy at any time. The date of last update is shown at the top of this page.
